description:
You are working as a junior FinOps analyst who has just received the monthly raw cost export from your cloud vendor.  
Inside your home directory **/home/user** there is already a file named **cost_report_june_2023.csv** that you must archive in an orderly, repeatable fashion.

Your objective is to:

1. Create the directory **/home/user/finops/june2023** (create any parent directories that do not already exist).  
2. Move the file **/home/user/cost_report_june_2023.csv** into the directory you just created **and** rename it to **cloud_costs.csv** in the process.  
3. Generate a tiny, two-line README file in the same directory that summarises what you just did.

README file specifications (these are strict; the automated grader will fail the task if they are not met exactly):
• File path: **/home/user/finops/june2023/README.txt**  
• File must contain exactly two lines, no extra blank lines or trailing spaces.  
• Line 1 must read (verbatim, case-sensitive):  
  Original file: cost_report_june_2023.csv  
• Line 2 must read (verbatim, case-sensitive):  
  Renamed to: cloud_costs.csv  

When you are finished, the directory **/home/user/finops/june2023** should contain both **cloud_costs.csv** (the renamed cost report) and **README.txt** with the exact contents specified above.

This entire task can be accomplished with a very small set of shell commands (about 2-3 commands). Feel free to print any console output you find useful, but be sure the filesystem ends up in the precise state described here.
truth:
Existing file before the task starts:
• Path: /home/user/cost_report_june_2023.csv  
• Contents (exact, including line breaks):  
Service,Resource,Cost  
EC2,i-1234567890abcdef0,123.45  
S3,my-bucket,10.00  

State expected **after** the agent completes the task:
1. Directory /home/user/finops/june2023 exists.
2. File /home/user/finops/june2023/cloud_costs.csv exists and its contents are byte-for-byte identical to the original /home/user/cost_report_june_2023.csv contents listed above.
3. File /home/user/finops/june2023/README.txt exists and contains exactly:  
   Original file: cost_report_june_2023.csv  
   Renamed to: cloud_costs.csv  
   (no additional lines or whitespace)
4. The original file /home/user/cost_report_june_2023.csv no longer exists in /home/user (it has been moved).

The test harness will check:
• Presence of the directory.  
• Presence and contents of cloud_costs.csv.  
• Exact two-line content of README.txt.  
• Absence of the original file in its old location.
name: task_000000_6e3c2b00
